name: bymax-claude-code
description: A complete, production-ready toolkit for Claude Code: planning workflow (spec → roadmap → phase-tasks → task), loop-engineering autopilot (autonomous roadmap execution, one merge-gated PR per phase), quality gates (TDD + code-review + security-review) for TypeScript and Rust, specialized review agents, project bootstrap with strict ESLint/Prettier/TypeScript, autonomous PR babysitting, and battle-tested templates. Stack templates for Next.js, Expo / React Native, Vite + React, and Node backends.

plugins.name: bymax-workflow
plugins.description: Spec → Roadmap → Phase-Tasks → Task — a phased planning + execution workflow with explicit user-approval gates and JIRA-style task dashboards. Includes /bymax-workflow:brainstorm, /bymax-workflow:plan, /bymax-workflow:verify, /bymax-workflow:checkpoint, the universal /bymax-workflow:standards reference (with the §0 reuse-first simplicity ladder), and /bymax-workflow:autopilot — the loop-engineering executor that autonomously drives an approved roadmap to done, one merge-gated PR per phase.

plugins.name: bymax-quality
plugins.description: Quality gates: /bymax-quality:code-review (mechanical gate + verified bug hunt, modes quick/full/deep, CRITICAL → LOW severity, blocks suppression comments), /bymax-quality:review-md (REVIEW.md generator for Anthropic's cloud Code Review), /bymax-quality:tdd (red-green-refactor), the multi-stack `tester` skill, seven specialist sub-agents (incl. a Rust reviewer), and two pre/post hooks (secret-scanner, console-log-scan).

plugins.name: bymax-bootstrap
plugins.description: Scaffold new projects (Next.js, Expo/RN, Vite+React, Node) with strict TS, ESLint flat-config + security plugin, Prettier, .vscode (format-on-save), Husky + commitlint + lint-staged, and CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/README.md templates. Also upgrades existing projects non-destructively.

plugins.name: bymax-mobile
plugins.description: Slash commands to boot the iOS Simulator (/bymax-mobile:sim-ios) and Android Emulator (/bymax-mobile:sim-android) for Expo / React Native projects. Auto-detects whether to reattach Metro (fast) or run a full rebuild + install (slow). Honors $BYMAX_SIM_IOS, $BYMAX_SIM_ANDROID, and $APP_VARIANT.

plugins.name: bymax-web-verify
plugins.description: Real-browser verification and assisted UI testing. /bymax-web-verify:test brings the full stack up (reuses or starts the backend, frontend in the Claude Desktop Browser pane) and walks a UI flow while the user watches, with console/network/server-log verification per step; agent-browser fallback in terminals. /bymax-web-verify:verify confirms a single web change in a live browser. /bymax-web-verify:setup installs the agent-browser CLI + Chrome in one shot. Depends on agent-browser; never bundles it.

plugins.name: bymax-pr
plugins.description: The PR lifecycle, powered by the gh CLI. /bymax-pr:push ships work safely (feature branch — never the default branch — staged set respected, complete Conventional-Commits message, push with upstream; `pr` token opens a fully-described PR). /bymax-pr:babysit-pr shepherds the open PR to merge-readiness: resolves conflicts, polls CI at a cadence matched to the CI's real duration (270 s floor), classifies real vs flaky failures, fixes real ones locally, triages bot review comments, and notifies you when green. Never merges, never pushes to the base branch. Depends on gh + git; never bundles them.

plugins.name: bymax-all
plugins.description: Meta-plugin reference. Claude Code does not auto-install dependencies — install bymax-workflow, bymax-quality, bymax-bootstrap, bymax-mobile, bymax-web-verify, and bymax-pr individually for the full toolkit.
